receipts.label: Borrowings & Other Liabilities
receipts.note: Fiscal deficit; financed mainly via dated G-Secs.

receipts.label: Income Tax
receipts.note: Personal income tax — biggest single direct tax.

receipts.label: GST & Other Indirect Taxes
receipts.note: CGST + Centre's share of IGST + Compensation Cess.

receipts.label: Non-tax Receipts
receipts.note: RBI dividend, PSU profits, spectrum, fees.

rupeeSpent.label: Interest Payments
rupeeSpent.takeaway: Servicing past borrowings — the single largest line.

rupeeSpent.label: States' Share of Taxes & Duties
rupeeSpent.takeaway: Devolved automatically per Finance Commission formula.

rupeeSpent.label: Centrally Sponsored Schemes
rupeeSpent.takeaway: Cost shared with States (e.g. MGNREGS, Samagra Shiksha).

rupeeSpent.label: Finance Commission & Other Transfers
rupeeSpent.takeaway: Grants to local bodies, disaster relief, revenue deficit grants.

calendar.title: Demands assembled
calendar.detail: Ministries send budget requests to the Finance Ministry; Department of Expenditure scrutinises.

calendar.title: Consolidation
calendar.detail: Finance Minister, Revenue & Expenditure Secretaries, and PMO finalise totals; Halwa Ceremony locks the documents.

calendar.title: Budget tabled
calendar.detail: Finance Minister presents Union Budget; Budget at a Glance, Receipt Budget, Expenditure Profile, all DGs released same day.

calendar.title: Demands voted
calendar.detail: Lok Sabha discusses & votes on each Demand for Grants; Appropriation Bill and Finance Bill passed.

calendar.title: Financial year begins
calendar.detail: Spending authorisation kicks in for the new FY (Apr–Mar).

calendar.title: Audit & review
calendar.detail: CAG audits actual spending; Standing Committees review Outcome Budget; Supplementary Demands as needed.

documents.doc: Union Budget Speech & Budget at a Glance

stateFlow.scheme: MGNREGS (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Scheme)

steps.label: Ministry of Rural Development
steps.detail: Nodal ministry; releases funds to States via PFMS

steps.label: MGNREGS
steps.detail: Centre pays 100% of wages + 75% of material

steps.label: State Govt (e.g. Jharkhand)
steps.detail: Receives funds in State Employment Guarantee Fund

steps.label: District (e.g. Ranchi)
steps.detail: DPC draws against approved labour budget

steps.label: Wage to worker
steps.detail: Direct Benefit Transfer to worker's bank/Aadhaar-linked account

hierarchyExample.ministry: Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways
